name: signature-pad
title: Signature Pad
description: Pointer/touch signature capture with clear + undo and a typed-name accessibility fallback.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Fires with { mode, dataUrl?, typedName?, signedAt } or null when cleared.

clinicalNotes: Always offer a non-drawing path — a canvas-only signature excludes people who cannot draw with a pointer, so a typed-name mode is a first-class alternative. Capture when it was signed with the image: a signature without a timestamp is weak evidence of consent, so every emitted value carries a signedAt. The stroke is stored as points (not just baked pixels) and re-rendered in the current theme's foreground colour so it stays high-contrast in light and dark; drawing uses touch-action:none and is motion-safe.
notes: Round-2 form component; canvas capture + button (undo/clear) + input (typed fallback) + toggle-group (mode). Backing store scales with devicePixelRatio.
